use_cases: Hero section background with organic flowing shapes
Landing page visual accent to create depth and movement
Decorative element for brand storytelling and visual interest
ai_summary: A CSS-driven animated blob effect component featuring morphing gradient shapes that create organic fluid backgrounds. The component renders minimal JSX structure with styling entirely handled via CSS classes. Ideal for adding visual interest and modern appeal to hero sections, landing pages, or as decorative background elements in SaaS and media applications.
